source: research assumptions from historical rate regimes, not account statements

policy.purpose: calibrated friction matrix bypass audit input

scenario_sources.fed_funds_rate: annual regime approximations from public historical rate environments; not a broker ledger
scenario_sources.dividend_yield: rough annual SPY/QQQ exposure assumptions for withholding stress only
scenario_sources.withholding_tax_rate: generic 30% non-resident withholding stress assumption; not entity-specific tax advice
scenario_sources.broker_spread_bps: research estimate of cash/broker spread applied only to SHV exposure
scenario_sources.event_bps: research estimate applied only to estimated turnover on state-machine action dates

sensitivity_boundary.base_case: intended to test whether flat 120bp annual drag over-penalizes the research NAV
sensitivity_boundary.harsh_case: multipliers are applied in code to tax, broker, operational, and event drag
not_covered: tax lots and realized capital gains

failure_boundary.margin_rate_above_8_percent: matrix must be replaced or a severe scenario added before using the calibration as a reference
failure_boundary.punitive_or_changed_withholding_tax: matrix invalid for that entity until tax counsel and actual withholding records are incorporated
failure_boundary.broker_margin_or_cash_interest_rule_chan: matrix invalid until broker statements confirm the new economics
failure_boundary.stage95_missing_or_unavailable: calibrated result cannot be used for production decisions
failure_boundary.live_execution_gate_enabled: backtest.cagr_uplift_audit must fail closed and refuse to run
